narrative:
East Cleveland-03-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 429 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 1.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 65.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 64.3 percentage points.
